The appointment of Shri R. K. Kamra, DDG, RO, Jammu, as the Statistics Officer for the State of Jammu & Kashmir is withdrawn. 2. Due to inclusion of the state of Arunachal Pradesh in ASI 2014-15, Sl. No 17 is modified as under : Sl. No. Statistics Officer Jurisdiction Address 17 Sh. Asis Ray, Assam, Meghalaya, 3rd Floor, C-Block, B-Wing, DDG, ZO, Guwahati Tripura, Arunachal Housefed Complex, Pradesh Basistha Road, Dispur, Guwahati-781006. [F. No. P-11012/3/2011-ESD] Dr. G. C. MANNA, ADG Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 -- 2 of 2 --
